titleStmt.title: SII 17.732: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 732. (A.R. No. 675 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

The details of date, viz., Prabhava, Makara śu. 5, Monday, Aṉiḻam are irregular as the combination of the paksha, tithi and the star are impossible in the month of Makara. The cyclic year Prabhava fell in Śaka 1309.

This inscription records the gift of 400 kuḻi of land made tax-free by the inhabitants of Ambattūr in Ambattūr-nāḍu to the deity Tirumullaivāyal-uḍaiya-Nāyiṉār, at Kāṉappeṟūr-nāḍu, in Vikkiṟamaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu alias Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam for the conduct of hunting festivals on saṅkrama days (Saṅkramappāḍivēṭṭai,) taking out the deity to the Ulaguyyakkoṇḍāṉ-ttiruttōppu.
The record also mentions the measuring rod muppattiraṇḍaḍikkōl.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇṭalīśvara hariyarāyavibhāṭa bhāṣaikkut tappu Irāyarakaṇṭa śrīvirapratāpa hariyarāya mahārāyaṟku cellāniṉṟa
prabhava vatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum pañcamiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭa
m Āṉa vikkiṟamacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya nayināṟku Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu Ampattūr nā
ṭṭu Ampattūr vallaṅkiḻāṉ coḻappallavataraiy(ā)rkaḷom Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya nāyiṉār caṅkṟamap pāṭiveṭṭaikku Eṅka
ḷūril tiruvitiyum Eḻuntaruḷi Ulakuyyak koṇṭāṉ tiruttoppil Eṟiaruḷukai yil maṇṭapak kuṟaivaṟuppukku Eṅkaḷ Ūril yerietir varampile Amanippa
ttil Ellaikku kiḻakku Ellai Ācaiyile peraḷavukolāl Inta Upaiyattukku Iṟaiyili māṉya(m)māka viṭṭatu kuḻi 4 100 Ikkuḻi nāṉūṟum muppattiraṇṭu Aṭikkolāl kai
kkoṇṭu maṇṭapakkuṟaivaṟuppāl Uḷḷatu śrīpaṇṭārattile naṭatti koḷḷak kaṭavarka ḷākavum Inta nilattukku Aṟunir perunīr kūṭai Iṟaittukoḷḷavum
tīṇirRead ‘taṇṇīr’•Uḷḷa Iṭattile kuṭalai turavu Iṭṭu Iṟaittukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku tirunāmattilkkāṇi Iṟaiyilimāṉyamāka candrādityavarai celvatāka cilāre
kai paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku Ampattūril Ūravarom Ippaṭikku Ivai coḻapallavaraiyarkaḷ kotai Āḻvār Eḻuttu
Ivai Āṇṭār Eḻuttu Ivai veṅkaṭavar Eḻuttu Ivai Aruḷāḷa nātar Eḻuttu Ivai tirumaṅkai Āḻvār Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla cilārekai paṇṇinamaikku
perumuḷaiūr Uṭaiyāṉ vāṉavar Īcar Eḻuttu 2 In=ta Upayattukku Akitam paṇṇi navarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kapilaiyai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷā
kavum 2 panmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 17.732 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
